docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY 19TH AUTO BODY CENTER ( SUNJIN CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ACURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ACURA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 19TH AUTO BODY CENTER ( SUNJIN CORP.) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE ACURA DEFENDANT WAIVED IMPROPER VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
